[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000011000 2
1 011000011 4
2 000000000 a
3 000101101 4
4 101010011 5
5 110100000 3
6 001011111 6
7 011011001 5

01 10 000000001 1
12 21 100000000 1
23 32 000000000 a match 2
34 43 001011001 4
45 54 000000000 a match 2
56 65 000000000 a match 2
67 76 000000000 a match 2
70 07 000000001 1

02 20 000100000 1
13 31 001010011 4
24 42 010000000 1
35 53 000000110 2
46 64 000011000 2 match 0
57 75 000000010 1
60 06 000001000 1
71 17 001000011 3

14 41 001010001 3
25 52 000100000 1
36 63 000011000 2 match 0
47 74 011000001 3
50 05 000100100 2
61 16 000010000 1
72 27 010000000 1

15 51 000000010 1
26 62 000000000 a match 2
37 73 001000011 3
